privileged_info_summary: Discovered that the task is defective. Critical scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1) are missing from the environment, which breaks the verifier completely because it attempts to read the non-existent task_result.json output file. The target directory structure requirements and expected file paths exactly match the explicit instructions in the prompt description.
